summary: This is an extremely brief post where Joel simply links to a discussion thread about pair programming. He notes that Kevin wants to hear about people's experiences with pair programming and adds that he is curious about it too. There is no substantive argument or analysis presented. The post functions purely as a pointer to a community discussion on Fog Creek's forums.
key_points: Joel signals interest in pair programming as a practice worth discussing
The post directs readers to a community forum thread for shared experiences
Joel positions himself as curious rather than opinionated on the topic
money_quotes: Kevin wants to hear about people's experience with pair programming. (I'm curious too!)
key_insight: Even influential bloggers sometimes use their platform simply to amplify community discussions rather than offer their own analysis.
